rulings.Case Title: ANNE H. TAKEMOTO VS. PROTOCALL, INC.,A NEW JERSEY CORPORATION DOING

rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 17, 2007, LINE 14. HEARING RE PETITIONER ANNE. H. TAKEMOTO'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF PROPOSED CLASS SETTLEMENT. A HEARING IS REQUIRED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Settling And Approving Receiver'S Final Report; Discharging Receiver; Exonerating Receiver'S Bond; Charging Parties With Outstanding Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 17, 2007, LINE 3. DAVID SUMMERS'Motion For Settling And Approving Receiver'S Final Report; Discharging Receiver; Exonerating Receiver'S Bond; Charging Parties With Outstanding Fees And Costs IS GRANTED. RECEIVER'S REPORT IS APPROVED; RECEIVER'S ACTS AND JUDGMENT APPROVED. BOND IS EXONERATED. RECEIVER'S TOTAL COMPENSATION IS APPROVED, $61,684.36, OF WHICH THE RECEIVER HAS RECEIVED $46,094.33. COUNSEL'S COMPENSATION OF $35,257.50 IS APPROVED; COUNSEL HAVING RECEIVED $22,899.00. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT ARE CHARGED A PROPORTIONATE AMOUNT, EXCEPT THAT DEFENDANT'S SHARE INCREASED BY $2,813.86. ESTATE TERMINATED UPON PAYMENT OF THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE RECEIVERSHIP ESTATE. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: CRAIG SCHRADER VS. THOMAS WADE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Special Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 17, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT JEFFREY HOWARD'S Special Motion To Strike IS GRANTED. (1) COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO HEAR THE MOTION. IT WAS FILED WITHIN SIXTY DAYS OF NOTICE OF TRANSFER. (2) IT APPEARS THAT THE PRIOR ACTION WAS TERMINATED IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR. (3) DEFENDANT HAD PROBABLE CAUSE TO FILE THE UNDERLYING ACTION BASED ON DEFENDANT SCHRADER'S NOTES AND THE CASE OF JONES VS. H. F. AHMANSEN. (4) THE EVIDENCE NEGATES PLAINTIFF'S MALICE CLAIM. (5) PLAINTIFF WAS DISMISSED IN THE PRIOR ACTION FOR TACTICAL REASONS. (6) DEFENDANT TO FILE A SEPARATE MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS. =(302/PJM/KD)
